name: Spicy Meat Roll
recipeIngredient: Bread crumbs, softened with Tomato juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, crumbs, tomato juice, parsley, oregano, salt, pepper, and garlic.
2. Add ground beef and mix well.
3. On wax paper, pat meat mixture into a 12x10 inch rectangle.
4. Arrange ham atop the meat, leaving a small margin around edges.
5. Sprinkle shredded cheese over ham.
6. Starting from the short end, carefully roll up the meat, using paper to lift.
7. Seal edges and ends well.
8. Place roll, seam side down in a 9x13 inch baking pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 1/4 hours.
10. Place cheese slices on top of the roll. Return to oven until cheese melts -- about 5 minutes.
11. Let stand 15 minutes.
12. Slice and serve.
